semantic_equivalence_statement: For the bounded profiles in this run, the materialized observable projection is invariant between the baseline schedule, the declared Stage 2 partition schedule, and every admissible partition-order permutation. This is bounded replay evidence only; it is not production scheduler or partition-analyzer promotion.
w037_required_observable_surface: reject codes and reject trace correlation identifiers
dependency consequence facts visible to later recalculation
overlay retention/release observations visible to pinned readers
format_delta and display_delta consequences when exercised by the promoted profile
runtime effect surfaces visible to TraceCalc or pack replay
deterministic replay bundle manifests and validation status
w037_requirement_statement: A Stage 2 scheduler or partition strategy is promotable only if observable results are invariant between the unpartitioned baseline execution and the Stage 2 execution for every promoted profile.
